About Me

I Get Local Businesses
On The Map —
Literally.

I'm Izzynatty. I specialise in one thing: helping local businesses get more customers through Google. That means optimizing your Google Business Profile, building websites that rank and convert, and running email campaigns that bring people back.

I don't do vanity metrics. I track what matters — views, calls, clicks, customers. Every strategy I run is built around real, measurable growth for your business.

From Daytona Beach to North Lauderdale to Indiana — my clients are ranking, getting found, and growing.

Work With Me

FAQ

Questions
Answered.

Still have questions? Send me an email — I respond within 24 hours.

Email Me
01What is GMB optimization and why do I need it?+
Your Google Business Profile is often the first thing customers see when they search for your business. Optimization means making it complete, accurate, and compelling — so Google ranks you higher and customers choose you over competitors.
02How quickly will I see results?+
Most clients see measurable improvements in local visibility within 2–4 weeks. Full ranking improvements typically take 1–3 months depending on your industry and local competition level.
03Can you help any type of local business?+
Yes — auto shops, retail stores, gyms, energy companies, restaurants, service providers and more. If customers search for you on Google, I can help you rank higher and get more of them through the door.
04Do you offer monthly management?+
Yes! I offer monthly GMB management packages to keep your profile optimized, post regularly, monitor reviews, and stay ahead of competitors — so your ranking keeps growing over time.
05How do I get started?+
Email me at israeldami64@gmail.com or fill out the contact form. Tell me your business name, what you need, and your goals. I'll reply within 24 hours with a plan and pricing tailored to your situation.
06Do you build websites as well as market them?+
Absolutely. I build WordPress websites AND optimize them for local search. You get a site that looks professional, loads fast, and actually gets found by customers searching on Google.
